title: OmniCompass
description: OmniCompass allows you to track biomes and structures using compasses! Fully configurable!
body:
![Structure Compass selection screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eCgKR4yS/images/9d2d8e3b9d638f29fb2c096ee4679df0cc2b51fe.png)

## 🧭 For Players

OmniCompass adds compasses capable of tracking any biome or structure!

By default, there are 2 compasses:

*   Biome Compass, which can track any biome, crafted from a compass and 4 planks
*   Structure Compass, capable of tracking any structure, made from a compass and 4 bricks

Both compasses can be disabled in the config!

To use a compass, simply right-click while holding it. This will open a menu, allowing you to select a target.

## ✨ For Modpack Creators

OmniCompass comes with extensive data pack support, which allows you to easily add your own compasses or edit and remove the default ones. This includes:

*   The ability to add multiple compasses
*   Compass target selection (biome, structure, or all biomes/structures)
*   Limiting compass targets based on advancements
*   Custom compass renderer (only a single base texture is needed, needle and its shadow are tinted)

Full documentation is available on the [wiki](https://moddedmc.wiki/en/project/omnicompass/latest/docs).

If the existing system doesn’t support your use case, make sure to open an issue on Github or to join the Discord and share your suggestions!

Please keep in mind that OmniCompass is still in beta, meaning issues can arise, and the datapack options will be expanded.
